ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Schedule Prove Up Eharing To Obtain Unlimited Default Court Judgmen
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Angie Diner, CSR 581. Telephone # 415 551 3775 (514)

Matther P. Harrington, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MUSEUM PARC RESIDENTIA CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VALERIE LEE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Mari Iki sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $65,050.10
Attorney's Fees: $2,800.00
Costs: $626.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $68,476.50
Judgment signed in open court.
